name: badge
title: Badge
description: Compact status pill. Six semantic variants (Neutral, Primary, Success, Warning, Error, Info) in a filled or outline appearance, with optional uppercase folding. Value-based and stateless: build with chained options and call Render.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct with New("LIVE"). The badge is an immutable value; chain options and call Render(). Variant convenience setters read at the call site: New("PASS").Success(), New("FAIL").Error(), plus Primary, Warning, Info, and Neutral (the zero value). WithVariant sets it directly. Filled (default) fills the variant color and writes the label in TextInverse; Outline() draws a rounded border in the variant color with no fill. Uppercase() folds the label at render time. An empty label renders as the empty string so conditional badges need no call-site guard. Neutral renders as a quiet surface chip rather than inverse-on-accent. Label() returns the pre-folding label.
